BillingID.interpretation: The distribution is roughly symmetric, light-tailed and relatively concentrated, and mean and median are close, so the average is reasonably representative.

InfrastructureCost.interpretation: The distribution is highly skewed, close to normal tail weight, and mean and median are close, so the average is reasonably representative.

CPUUsage.interpretation: The distribution is highly skewed, close to normal tail weight, and mean and median are close, so the average is reasonably representative.

InfrastructureCost_normalized.interpretation: The distribution is highly skewed, close to normal tail weight, and mean and median are close, so the average is reasonably representative.

InfrastructureCost_zscore.interpretation: The distribution is highly skewed, close to normal tail weight, and mean and median differ enough that the median is more representative.

CPUUsage_normalized.interpretation: The distribution is highly skewed, close to normal tail weight, and mean and median are close, so the average is reasonably representative.

CPUUsage_zscore.interpretation: The distribution is highly skewed, close to normal tail weight, and mean and median differ enough that the median is more representative.
